---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Rosemary"
date: 2019-12-27
trailer: "gallery/rosemary/preview/006-stars_and_the_night_sky.png"
splash:
  image: "gallery/rosemary/image/006-stars_and_the_night_sky.png"
  caption: "Rosemary and Jasmine"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

"There’s rosemary, that’s for remembrance, pray you love, remember" (William Shakespeare)

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
